diary_entries.entry: Population: 14. Hydroponic crops show signs of blight. I spent the year on terraforming. Closest to Nova.
Year 22 on Mars. Hydroponic crops show signs of blight. Morale is hopeful. We have 1286 food units left.
Another year. Hydroponic crops show signs of blight. The colony feels hopeful. My resolve grows stronger.
